rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings and assignments.
Insert AGREE contracts after relevant subcomponents and connections in implementation scopes.
generic_rules: Use component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that reference component ports.
Preserve AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annexes in valid scopes relative to subcomponents and connections.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level bindings must be placed in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts without explicit variable representation.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
